name: Collectible scoring
summary: Collect objects, destroy the collected item, and update a score variable.
llm1Hint: Players can collect items such as coins or gems for score.

commands: set variable name=Score value=<InitialValue> type=Number scope=global
examples: set variable name=Score value=0 type=Number scope=global
on collision Player Coin -> destroy Coin, score+1

constraints.scoreVariable: Use Score as the default global score variable.
constraints.pickupAction: A collectible collision should remove the collected object or otherwise mark it as consumed.
